paper_title: Holocene Records and Age Model Analysis

methods.description: Process for analyzing sediment slices from the Jumbo Piston NBP9903 Core 10 (JPC-10) to generate Holocene records.

steps.description: Collect sediment slices from the Jumbo Piston NBP9903 Core 10 (JPC-10) during the United States Antarctic Program Cruise 03 in 1999.
steps.searchable_summary: collect sediment slices from JPC-10 core

steps.description: Analyze 326, 86, and 81 samples for HBI, TEX L 86, and diatom census counts respectively.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze samples for HBI, TEX L 86, and diatom counts

steps.description: Analyze 19 sediment samples from ODP 1098 for comparison with Shevenell et al. (2011).
steps.searchable_summary: compare sediment samples with Shevenell et al. (2011)

methods.description: Development of an age model for core JPC-10 based on magnetic susceptibility correlation and radiocarbon dating.

steps.description: Correlate magnetic susceptibility (MS) of JPC-10 with MS at ODP Site 1098.
steps.searchable_summary: correlate MS of JPC-10 with ODP 1098

steps.description: Control correlation with two radiocarbon dates from JPC-10, corrected and calibrated using Calib 6.1.1.
Reconstruct Holocene variability at a centennial scale using the age model.
steps.searchable_summary: reconstruct Holocene variability using age model

steps.description: Calculate sedimentation rate (SR) for different periods based on the age model.
steps.searchable_summary: calculate sedimentation rate from age model
